# databasus_notifier_webhook (Resource)

Webhook Notifier resource to create/manage notifiers that trigger a webhook / URL

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "databasus_workspace" "example" {
  name = "my-workspace-local-storage"
}

resource "databasus_notifier_webhook" "example" {
  name           = "my-webhook-notifier"
  body_template  = "{ \"title\": \"{{heading}}\", \"message\": \"{{message}}\" }"
  webhook_method = "POST"
  webhook_url    = "https://localhost:8088/webhooktest"
  # please note that the headers field is marked as sensitive, yet the values will be stored unencrypted in your TF State file
  headers = {
    Authorization = "Bearer myescuretoken"
  }
  workspace_id = resource.databasus_workspace.example.id
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `body_template` (String) The template string for the request body to be sent to the webhook URL. Supported pLaceholders are '{{heading}}' and '{{message}}'.
- `name` (String) The name of the storage to be created
- `webhook_method` (String) The HTTP method to use, in most cases POST
- `webhook_url` (String) The full URL to send the notification to
- `workspace_id` (String) The id of the workspace the storage belongs to

### Optional

- `headers` (Map of String, Sensitive) Map of headers to send. Header name is the key and 'value' is the header value. NOTE: headers could contain sensitive values which, even though marked as sensitive, are stored unencrypted in the state file

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The internal Id of the Storage Configuration
- `last_save_error` (String) lastSaveError value generated by databasus (API description unclear)
